heading: Applications
label: 60303 Applications
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14163b of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Attorney General shall establish a process through which a State may apply for a grant under this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A State desiring a grant under this chapter shall submit an application to the Attorney General at such time, in such manner, and containing such information as the Attorney General may reasonably require.

children.label: A
children.text: a certification by an appropriate officer of the State that the State authorizes capital punishment under its laws and conducts, or will conduct, prosecutions in which capital punishment is sought;

children.label: B
children.text: a description of the communities to be served by the grant, including the nature of existing capital defender services and capital prosecution programs within such communities;

children.label: i
children.text: reflects consultation with the judiciary, the organized bar, and State and local prosecutor and defender organizations; and

children.label: ii
children.text: establishes as a priority improvement in the quality of trial-level representation of indigents charged with capital crimes and trial-level prosecution of capital crimes;

children.label: D
children.text: in the case of a State that employs a statutory procedure described in , a certification by an appropriate officer of the State that the State is in substantial compliance with the requirements of the applicable State statute; andsection 60301(e)(1)(C) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: used to supplement and not supplant non-Federal funds that would otherwise be available for activities funded under this chapter; and

children.label: ii
children.text: allocated in accordance with .section 60306(b) of this title
